phaseName: Verify ACL providers dialog includes free providers
goal: Confirm the ACL API key edit dialog shows noAuth/free providers even when DB has no connections.
summary: ACL providers dialog verified via two complementary smoke tests. Step 1 (runtime): started standalone server on PORT=3005 with REQUIRE_API_KEY=true, logged in via POST /api/auth/login (cookie auth, password 123456), GET /api/providers returned 97 providers with 8 noAuth=true entries (mimo-free, opencode, coqui, edge-tts, google-tts, local-device, searxng, tortoise) and zero DB connections. Step 2 (dashboard): orchestrator used Playwright to log in, navigate to /dashboard/endpoint, create a test API key (sk-e6288bca...), open its Edit Access dialog, uncheck the Providers "All allowed" checkbox, and confirm the expanded providerList rendered all 97 providers — including the 8 noAuth providers plus mmf and xiaomi-mimo, each showing "0 conn". Worker 01e4982b re-confirmed the API independently (97 providers, 8 noAuth=true). Honest reconciliation: the API's noAuth=true set (8) is a strict subset of the dialog's 10 free providers — mmf & xiaomi-mimo render as free via a pricing criterion rather than the noAuth boolean, but all noAuth providers are present with count=0, satisfying the verify intent. Servers + temp files cleaned up (PID-based kill, no pkill self-match).
stepSummaries:
1. Runtime smoke: start server and GET /api/providers; assert providers[] includes noAuth providers. [verified]
  2. Dashboard smoke: open endpoint key dialog and verify free providers appear in the Providers list. [verified]

reviewerRationale: All gates pass; project checks validate.

gateVerdicts.evidence: Step 1: curl /api/providers → 97 providers, 8 noAuth=true (runtime smoke, real HTTP). Step 2: orchestrator Playwright snapshot of Edit Access dialog (e400=edge-tts 0 conn, e560=opencode 0 conn, e516=mimo-free 0 conn) + worker 01e4982b re-confirmed API (97 providers, 8 noAuth).
gateVerdicts.rationale: Both steps used real verification — Step 1 was an authenticated curl against a live server (smoke), Step 2 drove a real browser through the actual dashboard UI (smoke) plus an independent API re-confirmation. No proxies or sentinels.

gateVerdicts.evidence: Playwright snapshot e290 shows all 97 providers incl. noAuth entries with '0 conn': coqui(e384), edge-tts(e400), google-tts(e452), local-device(e512), mimo-free(e516), mmf(e532), opencode(e560), searxng(e608), tortoise(e636), xiaomi-mimo(e664).
gateVerdicts.rationale: Phase goal was to confirm the ACL dialog lists noAuth/free providers with zero DB connections — the expanded Providers list rendered all 97 providers including the 8 noAuth ones (plus mmf/xiaomi-mimo) each showing '0 conn', satisfying the goal.

gateVerdicts.evidence: Honest reconciliation documented in worker 01e4982b report: API noAuth=true set (8) is a strict subset of the dialog's 10 free providers — mmf & xiaomi-mimo render as free via pricing criterion, not the noAuth boolean. Verification intent still holds.
gateVerdicts.rationale: Nothing deferred — both steps completed fully. The minor API/dialog classification difference (8 vs 10) was honestly reconciled rather than hidden, and does not affect the verify intent (noAuth providers present with count=0).
